zh.lifeSummary: 當Gwladys ferch Ithel於大約1175年出生在威爾士蒙格莫利夏爾時，她的父親Ithel ap Rhys of Glamorgan22歲，母親Gwenllian Fechan verch Sir Hywel-9歲。她和Madog ap Gruffydd Prince of Powys Fadog至少有6個兒子。她去世於1221年在威爾士蒙格莫利夏爾維爾申普爾享年47歲，埋葬在威爾士丹比爾丹比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gwladys ferch Ithel于大约1175年出生在威尔士蒙格莫利夏爾时，她的父亲Ithel ap Rhys of Glamorgan22岁，母亲Gwenllian Fechan verch Sir Hywel-9岁。她和Madog ap Gruffydd Prince of Powys Fadog至少有6个儿子。她去世于1221年在威尔士蒙格莫利夏爾維爾申普爾享年47岁，埋葬在威尔士丹比爾丹比。

nameMeanings.name: Ithel
meanings: A Welsh name derived from the Greek, signifying 'blooming luxuriantly, flourishing, rich.'. It is from Ithel that we have first the name Ap-Ithel, then by corruption, Bithell and Bethell.

nameMeanings.name: Gwladys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old form of   Gladys  , of uncertain derivation.

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

en.lifeSummary: When Gwladys ferch Ithel was born about 1175, in Montgomeryshire, Wales, her father, Ithel ap Rhys of Glamorgan, was 22 and her mother, Gwenllian Fechan verch Sir Hywel, was -9. She had at least 6 sons with Madog ap Gruffydd Prince of Powys Fadog. She died in 1221, in Welshpool, Montgomeryshire, Wales, at the age of 47, and was buried in Denbigh, Denbighshire, Wales.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gwladys ferch Ithel est née environ 1175, à Montgomeryshire, Galles, son père, Ithel ap Rhys of Glamorgan, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Gwenllian Fechan verch Sir Hywel, avait -9 ans. Elle a eu au moins 6 fils avec Madog ap Gruffydd Prince of Powys Fadog. Elle est décédée en 1221, à Welshpool, Montgomeryshire, Galles, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterrée à Denbigh, Denbighshire, Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gwladys ferch Ithel um 1175 in Montgomeryshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ithel ap Rhys of Glamorgan 22 und ihre Mutter Gwenllian Fechan verch Sir Hywel -9. Sie hatte mit Madog ap Gruffydd Prince of Powys Fadog mindestens 6 Söhne. Sie starb 1221 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Welshpool, Montgomeryshire, Wales und wurde in Denbigh, Denbighshire, Wales begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gwladys ferch Ithel è nata il circa 1175 nel Montgomeryshire, Galles, sua padre, Ithel ap Rhys of Glamorgan, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Gwenllian Fechan verch Sir Hywel, aveva -9 anni. Lei avuto almeno 6 figli con Madog ap Gruffydd Prince of Powys Fadog. Morì nel 1221, nel Welshpool, Montgomeryshire, Galles, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolta a Denbigh, Denbighshire, Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Gwladys ferch Ithelが約1175年にウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアで生まれた時，父Ithel ap Rhys of Glamorganは22歳，母Gwenllian Fechan verch Sir Hywelは-9歳であった。彼女はMadog ap Gruffydd Prince of Powys Fadogとの間に少なくとも6人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1221年にウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアウエルシュプオオルで47歳で死去し，ウェールズデンビグhシュアイアデンビグにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gwladys ferch Ithel(이)가 대략 1175년 웨일스 몽고머이실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ithel ap Rhys of Glamorgan(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gwenllian Fechan verch Sir Hywel(은)는 -9세였다. 그녀는 Madog ap Gruffydd Prince of Powys Fadog(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1221년 웨일스 몽고머이실르 웰쉬포에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 웨일스 덴비그h실르 덴비그h에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gwladys ferch Ithel nasceu aproximadamente 1175, em Montgomeryshire, Gales, seu pai, Ithel ap Rhys of Glamorgan, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Gwenllian Fechan verch Sir Hywel, tinha -9 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 6 filhos com Madog ap Gruffydd Prince of Powys Fadog. Ela faleceu em 1221, em Welshpool, Montgomeryshire, Gales, com 47 anos, e foi sepultada em Denbigh, Denbighshire, Gales.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gwladys ferch Ithel родилась около 1175 г. в местности монтгомиришир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Ithel ap Rhys of Glamorgan было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Gwenllian Fechan verch Sir Hywel, -9. У неё было по крайней мере 6 сыновей от Madog ap Gruffydd Prince of Powys Fadog. Она умерла в 1221 г. в местности велшпул, монтгомиришир, Уэльс в возрасте 47 лет и была похоронена в местности денбаи, денбаишир, Уэльс.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gwladys ferch Ithel nació aproximadamente 1175, en Montgomeryshire, Gales, su papá, Ithel ap Rhys of Glamorgan, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Gwenllian Fechan verch Sir Hywel, tenía -9 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos con Madog ap Gruffydd Prince of Powys Fadog. Murió en 1221, en Welshpool, Montgomeryshire, Gales, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultada en Denbigh, Denbighshire, Gales.
